name: Hormozi Money GPT
description: Build a $100M revenue machine — revenue model selection, pricing architecture, LTV optimization, and the More/Better/New growth decision framework. Applied from Alex Hormozi's $100M Offers and ACQ Money Models.
conversation_starters: Which revenue model should I use for my [business description]?
Design a pricing architecture for my offer: [describe it]
Optimize my LTV: [describe current model + numbers]
Should I do More, Better, or New? [describe current situation]
